unified_frame_statement: Robert shares his race against time with Coach Dana, showing how urgent accountability helped him overcome procrastination paralysis and finally complete his life's work.

state_alpha.sensory_anchor: The growing stack of unfinished manuscripts on his desk

the_abyss.realization: "I've been waiting for perfect while life was running out."

the_spark.insight_quote: "She gave me 90 days. Not a year. 90 days. Suddenly it was real." (07:55)

state_omega.result: Book completed in 87 days after 12 years of delay

sensory_anchors: The dust on half-written pages before
The electric focus during the commitment call
The weight of the finished manuscript in his hands now
